context.audience: Frontend developers building chat interfaces, full-stack developers implementing real-time AI features, product engineers optimizing perceived latency for AI-powered applications
pain_points: Implementing server-sent events and streaming responses across different frameworks
Handling partial JSON and structured output in streaming contexts
Managing error states and reconnection logic for long-running streams
Streaming through edge functions and CDN proxies without buffering issues
Building responsive UIs that render tokens as they arrive
content_that_works: UX pattern guides for streaming AI responses
